title: Linux下QQ音乐闪退
content:
LInux下QQ音乐闪退的问题​    Ubuntu下安装deb版本的QQ音乐会遇到点击图标闪退的问题，解决方法如下：

在终端使用命令 qqmusic —no-sandbox 即可打开

上面这种方法不能一劳永逸，那么可以修改desktop配置
在Exec这行添加 —no-sandbox %U
sudo vim /usr/share/applications/qqmusic.desktop[Desktop Entry]Name=qqmusicExec=/opt/qqmusic/qqmusic --no-sandbox %UTerminal=falseType=ApplicationIcon=qqmusicStartupWMClass=qqmusicComment=Tencent QQMusicCategories=AudioVideo;
 如没有生效则重启

title: Hello World
content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.
Quick StartCreate a new post$ hexo new "My New Post"
More info: Writing
Run server$ hexo server
More info: Server
Generate static files$ hexo generate
More info: Generating
Deploy to remote sites$ hexo deploy
More info: Deployment
